compiled_state.title: test-shell-safety-directives.sh: create-dso-app.sh missing shell safety directive causes test failure
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
test-shell-safety-directives.sh fails because create-dso-app.sh is missing a required shell safety directive. Verified pre-existing: failure reproduces on main branch with changes stashed.

## Steps to Reproduce
Run validate.sh --ci or test-shell-safety-directives.sh directly.

## Expected Behavior
All scripts pass the shell safety directive check.

## Actual Behavior
create-dso-app.sh is flagged as missing a required safety directive.

## Notes
Pre-existing failure unrelated to session changes.
